case_title: POLLACK, MICHAEL DBA ACTUALIZING HYPNOTHERAPY VS FLEMING, ANNE MARIE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FLEMING, ANNE MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT POLLACK, MICHAEL DBA ACTUALIZING HYPNOTHERAPY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE FILED BY DEFT. $10 FEE PAID.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLLACK, MICHAEL DBA ACTUALIZING HYPNOTHERAPY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLEMING, ANNE MARIE $85.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
